-This site is best viewed in 800x600 with Internet Explorer 3.0 or higher.  If it is viewed in Netscape, it doesn't look right.

xtreme Corp

    In this section you can buy JAPANESE Dragon Ball Z and GT tapes that have ENGLISH SUBTITLES.  They are COMPLETELY UNEDITED!!!  and very sweet!  Below I have listed all of the videos which I have for you to choose from along with the tape quality, description, and prices.  THESE ARE NOT THE CRAPPY FUNIMATION ONES.  Oh... and you can order right here online.
